ddls:
CREATE TABLE "celestial_objects" (
  "sspid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each celestial object */,
  "sky2000_id" TEXT /* Sky2000 identifier for the celestial object */,
  "ra" REAL /* Right ascension of the object (in degrees) */,
  "de" REAL /* Declination of the object (in degrees) */,
  "vmag" REAL /* Apparent magnitude of the object */,
  "pmra" REAL /* Proper motion in right ascension (in milliarcseconds/year) */,
  "pmde" REAL /* Proper motion in declination (in milliarcseconds/year) */,
  "x_coord" REAL /* X coordinate in galactic coordinates */,
  "y_coord" REAL /* Y coordinate in galactic coordinates */,
  "z_coord" REAL /* Z coordinate in galactic coordinates */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the celestial object */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from Earth in parsecs */,
  "redshift" REAL /* Redshift value */,
  "stellar_class" TEXT /* Stellar classification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sspid")
)

CREATE TABLE "observatories" (
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observatory */,
  "observatory_name" TEXT /* Name of the observatory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the observatory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the observatory */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation above sea level */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the observatory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sspid" INTEGER /* Reference to the celestial object observed */,
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observatory where the observation was made */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation took place */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the observation data */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time of the observation in seconds */,
  "telescope" TEXT /* Specific telescope used for the observation */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for the observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observatory_id FOREIGN KEY ("observatory_id") REFERENCES observatories ("observatory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_sspid FOREIGN KEY ("sspid") REFERENCES celestial_objects ("sspid")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality rating */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the data quality (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Numerical value representing the confidence level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Professional title of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher leading the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher assigned to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher accessing the data */,
  "sspid" INTEGER /* Reference to the celestial object being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to access the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_sspid FOREIGN KEY ("sspid") REFERENCES celestial_objects ("sspid")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first researcher in the collaboration */,
  "researcher_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second researcher in the collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project they are collaborating on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id_2") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id_1") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observational_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of observational data */,
  "sspid" INTEGER /* Reference to the celestial object observed */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation record */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FITS, CSV) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the data file on the server */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observational_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observational_data_sspid FOREIGN KEY ("sspid") REFERENCES celestial_objects ("sspid")
)
